steps.title: Apply the slope formula to find the slope
steps.content:
The slope of a line between two points is $m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$, the ratio of the vertical change to the horizontal change.

With points $(0, 0)$ and $(13, 14)$:

$$m = \frac{14 - 0}{13 - 0} = \frac{14}{13}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
